name: @metorial/heygen
description: Generate AI avatar videos from text or audio scripts, with customizable avatars, voices, backgrounds, and multi-scene layouts. Translate videos into multiple languages with lip-sync. Create personalized video campaigns at scale using templates with dynamic variables. Stream real-time interactive avatar sessions for conversational AI experiences. Generate text-to-speech audio. Create photo avatar videos from uploaded photos. Upload and manage image, video, and audio assets. Monitor video generation status via webhooks and check account credit balances.
